review: These cookies are absolutely gorgeous. I ordered the 12-count holiday box as a gift and the recipient was floored. The royal icing work is so clean and detailed. Snowflake design especially came out stunning. Arrived well-packaged and still fresh. Will order again every December.

Ordered the 24-count box for an office holiday party and they were a hit. Every single cookie was professionally decorated and tasted great. Everyone asked where they came from. Packed carefully and nothing was broken. Already planning to reorder for next year.

Cute 6-count sampler, perfect for a housewarming gift. The recipient loved them. Giving 4 stars because one cookie had a small ding in the icing but it was a tiny thing. Seller was responsive. The cookies tasted really good — soft and buttery with good almond flavor.

Ordered the Quinceañera cookie set for my daughter's celebration in pink and gold. Chris nailed it. The tiara cookie was everyone's favorite. Guests kept asking if they were store-bought because they looked so professional. The detail on the number 15 was perfect. Worth every penny.

Got the birthday box for my mom's 60th. Requested purple and gold colors and they came out perfect. She teared up when she opened the box. The balloon and cake slice cookies were her favorites. Shipped fast and arrived fresh. This is my go-to for birthday gifts now.

Beautiful holiday cookie box. Got it as a Christmas gift for my neighbor who bakes herself and even she was impressed. The poinsettia design was intricate and the icing was smooth. Packaged very well. Will definitely order again.

Second order from this shop and just as good as the first. The sampler is perfect for small gatherings. My kids demolished these in under an hour. The star design has such clean edges. Fast shipping from Las Vegas, arrived in 3 days.

The Dia de los Muertos cookies were gorgeous. I set them out as part of our altar and people kept admiring them. The sugar skull was the most detailed I've seen on a decorated cookie. Vibrant colors that really pop. Will order again in October.

Ordered the 24-count event set for a baby shower dessert table. The two designs I chose — a onesie and a baby carriage — were executed perfectly. Guests thought they were from a fancy bakery. Chris communicated well throughout and delivered exactly on time.

The cookie designs were cute and the taste was good. Knocked off stars because two cookies arrived cracked — not broken in half but visibly cracked through the icing. The packaging could be better for fragile iced cookies. Seller responded quickly and offered to reship, which I appreciated.

Third order! I get these every Christmas for my family cookie exchange. The quality is consistent, the flavors are great, and the icing details just get more impressive each time. The 12-count box is perfect size for an exchange. Chris is the best.

Valentine's Day cookies were adorable and romantic. The heart and arrow designs were sweet without being cheesy. My husband loved them. Arrived a full two days before Valentine's which I appreciated. Will order these every year.
